title: Briefings nav redesign — prev/next triad, issue-jump strip, mobile bar
summary: Replaced the back-far link list in all 14 briefing files (002–015) with a clean three-element triad: ← Prev · Archive ↑ · Next → . The same triad appears at the bottom of every briefing as a .briefing-nav control bar placed before the colophon — the nav bar is the utility affordance, the colophon is the editorial context, intentionally separate (same pattern as Stripe Press ending sections). Added a sticky mobile bar (.briefing-mob-bar) to every briefing so phones get prev/next without the masthead-nav visible at all. On /briefings/index.html, added a compact issue-jump strip (15 numbered tiles, 001–015) in the header after the statstrip — each tile scrolls to that issue's archive entry for a summary preview before clicking through. The latest tile (015) is amber-tinted and labeled. Removed the border-top on .jump-strip to avoid a double-rule against the statstrip's existing border-bottom. Section anchors inside each briefing are preserved as-is — no normalization of that variation this pass.
